name: Lux
cardDescription: Spacious suite with separate living area, sleeping up to 4 guests. Features a customizable orthopedic mattress, bathroom with shower and tub, and smart TV with streaming options. Includes MAYRVEDA tea station, eco-friendly amenities, individual climate control, and optional Sleep Menu. Wi-Fi and safe provided.
roomDescription: Indulge in a spacious suite designed for both relaxation and convenience, comfortably accommodating up to four guests. The layout features a separate living area with a plush sofa corner, complemented by a double bed offering a selection of orthopedic mattress firmness for personalized sleep comfort. Your private bathroom includes both a shower and bathtub, while the smart TV supports Google TV and Apple TV connectivity. Enhance your stay with a tea station featuring MAYRVEDA herbal teas, eco-friendly toiletries, and individual climate control. For optimal rest, a dedicated Sleep Menu is available upon request, with additional amenities including Wi-Fi and a safe completing this carefully curated environment.
